task_completion.description: Verify the 3D Slicer layout is set to 'Four-Up' (2x2 grid of slice views)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The central workspace displays four rectangular slice views arranged in a 2x2 grid. The layout selector or menu may show 'Four-Up' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify four different MRI sequences are displayed (T1, T1ce, T2, FLAIR)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Each of the four panels displays a different image contrast. The text annotations in the corners of each panel (if visible) identify different volumes (e.g., 't1', 't1ce', 't2', 'flair').

task_completion.description: Verify all four views are linked and displaying the same anatomical plane
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slice number or offset displayed in the corner of each viewport is identical across all panels. The link icon (chain link) in the slice control bar is active/depressed. The anatomy appears aligned.

task_completion.description: Verify the view is navigated to an axial slice showing the tumor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slice number displayed is within the range 65-95 (e.g., 'Axial: 75'). A distinct tumor mass (hyperintense or hypointense region) is visible within the brain tissue.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saves the screenshot to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog, 'Screen Capture' module, or file browser is visible showing the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/SlicerData/Screenshots/four_panel_comparison.png'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the 3D Slicer GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the standard 3D Slicer interface, including the module panel, toolbar, and slice viewers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use external image editors to create the comparison
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not use command-line tools (like ImageMagick) or external editors (like GIMP) to stitch separate screenshots together.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is not simply opening a pre-existing result image
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not viewing a static image file named 'four_panel_comparison.png' inside an image viewer application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient ID: BraTS2021_00000. The dataset contains four sequences: t1, t1ce, t2, and flair. The tumor is located in the axial slice range of 65 to 95. The expected output is a 2x2 grid layout showing all four sequences aligned.
